description_long: This kiosk features a robust, angular structure with a prominent digital display screen mounted at the top, showcasing a futuristic interface with blue and red circular graphics. The main body is constructed from a combination of matte black and metallic orange panels, giving it an industrial yet modern appearance. The front lower section is adorned with a stylized swirl logo on a wooden or wood-textured panel, adding a touch of warmth to the otherwise utilitarian design. Side panels are reinforced with visible bolts and geometric accents, including a triangular motif, suggesting durability and a high-tech function. The kiosk's base is wide and stable, with vent-like details and a recessed compartment, possibly for power or maintenance access. The overall design is sleek, functional, and intended for interactive use in urban environments.
description: A modern, industrial kiosk with a large digital display, orange and black metal panels, and a wood-textured front accent featuring a swirl logo.
description_view_0: Front view shows the digital display, wood-textured panel with swirl logo, and main interactive interface.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the angular structure, metallic orange panels, and geometric accents.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the kiosk's solid back, wood-textured side panels, and recessed base details.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with visible bolts, triangular motif, and sturdy base.
attribute_signage_type: digital display integrated into the upper front structure, showing a circular blue and red interface; stylized swirl logo printed on the lower wood-textured panel
attribute_roof_design: flat, integrated with the digital display, constructed from black metal or plastic with no overhangs or decorative elements
attribute_architectural_style: modern industrial with minimalist and high-tech influences
